phase_name: sessions 17-19 complete — Li criterion + Connes scaffolding

completed_tasks.name: S17: Li coefficients via FFT-Taylor for n=1..200 (200dp)
S17: Gamma/zeta decomposition — oscillation, M-function connection
S18: N_0=11 Gamma dominance, GUE suppression, B-L comparison
S18: Avenue 4 DEAD END — truncated Euler product
S19: PROVED lambda_n^Gamma > 0 for n >= 8 (exact formula)
S19: NEGATIVE RESULT — bounding zeta part IS equivalent to RH
S19: Connes framework researched and scaffolding built

remaining_tasks.name: Implement proper W_R (archimedean Weil distribution) from arxiv:2511.22755 eqs 4.2-4.4
Implement correct rank-one perturbation with Weil-modified inner product
Reproduce paper's 10^{-60} accuracy zero matching with N=120
Write Li criterion preprint documenting S17-19 decomposition results
Prolate wave operator experiment: UV spectrum vs zeta zeros

blockers.blocker: Connes W_R formula requires reading arxiv:2511.22755 Section 4 in detail

human_actions_pending.action: Optionally fetch arxiv:2511.22755 PDF for precise formula extraction

decisions.decision: Li criterion investigation reached fundamental circularity — bounding zeta part IS RH
decisions.rationale: Off-line zero creates singularity inside unit disk of generating function F(x) = log_sz(1/(1-x)), causing exponential growth and lambda_n < 0. No unconditional shortcut via Stieltjes constants.

decisions.decision: Connes construction is the most promising remaining avenue
decisions.rationale: 2025 paper achieves 10^{-60} zero matching with only 6 primes and N=120. Explicit, computable operator. Gap to proof is one step: showing min eigenvector of QW approximated by prolate functions.

decisions.decision: Scaffolding built but needs precise paper formulas for accuracy
decisions.rationale: W_{0,2} and W_p components work. QW from zeros (circular) confirms structure. W_R and rank-one perturbation need exact formulas from Section 4 of arxiv:2511.22755.

next_action: SESSION 20: Either (1) fetch arxiv:2511.22755 and implement exact W_R + perturbation formulas, or (2) write Li criterion preprint. The Connes approach is the most concrete path to RH ever constructed — reproducing the paper's numerics would be a major milestone.
context_notes: Sessions 17-19 produced 10 Li scripts and 2 Connes scripts. Li framework: li_criterion.py, li_prime_anatomy.py, li_extended.py, li_highorder.py, li_M_connection.py, li_asymptotics.py, li_euler_product.py, li_bombieri_lagarias.py, li_gamma_proof.py, li_zeta_bound.py. Connes: connes_weil.py, connes_spectral.py. Key analytical result: g_k = (-1)^k*[(1-2^{-k})zeta(k)-1]/k. Python: /c/Python313/python.exe.
